return(function(...)local return(function(U,p,S,G,f,X,B,L,c,b,P,Q,Y,H,w,R,j,O,a,A,W)w,j,Y,A,R,W,P,H,b,O,a,c,L,Q={},function(f)for M=491569249%4382919+-682320,#f,-26261+1814106504%(2962891102%22490444)do
